sampleResults.title: London police arrest over 200 in Palestine Action protest
sampleResults.description: London police detained more than 200 protesters during a demonstration against the government’s ban on Palestine Action, a group labelled a terrorist organisation. Despite a High Court ruling declaring the ban unlawful, it remains in place pending appeal.

sampleResults.title: Eric Swalwell Allegations: Who Is Ally Sammarco? Influencer Accusing Congressman Amid Sexual Assault row
sampleResults.description: Ally Sammarco, a Washington DC-based political strategist and influencer, is among four women accusing California Congressman Eric Swalwell of misconduct.
